programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: In Royal Melbourne Emergency, a teen jockey has been crushed under a horse, fracturing her pelvis. This potentially career-ending injury isn’t Dr Mya Cubitt’s biggest worry. Dr Scott Taylor uses a clever hack for removing rings from swollen fingers.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A crane operator is crushed under falling steel at work and is flown to The Royal Melbourne. Dr Jonathan Papson calls in reinforcements as the young worker’s vital signs worsen. Dr Emma West treats an erratic pregnant woman.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
